title: Document HIR phase-indexed shared-core model
body:
Documented the **HIR** as a phase-indexed shared core: which nodes exist at which pipeline stage, how later passes mutate or replace subtrees, and where normalization/desugar plugs in.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`230269f`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/230269f)
- **Subject:** Add HIR documentation structure and phase-indexed shared-core model foundation
- **Completed:** 2026-02-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Pecan was experimenting with **staged** analysis (parse → lower → resolve → type) before Beskid unified those phases under `beskid_pipeline`. The HIR doc prevented ad-hoc AST copies per pass. Foundation for normalization (`hir-normalization-for-desugar`), `HirQuery` traversal, and visitor refactors in the same deliverable.

source.subject: Add HIR documentation structure and phase-indexed shared-core model foundation
